subject: Dec 30th, 2025
fact: The session takes place on December 30th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 30th, 2025

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is the master of the palace and the party's current contact.
source_quote: Maram il Vass's opulent office

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur is an artificer who created two sets of magical armor.
source_quote: Felkur had used his magical abilities to create two sets of armor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim possesses enhanced sight that reveals the true form of the Yugoloth.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws to Bramgrim's enhanced sight

subject: Daein
fact: Daein weaves a convincing story about the armor's origin to deceive Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Daein seized the opportunity and wove the suggestion into their story

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marks a Chasme Demon with her hunter's focus.
source_quote: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the drow prisoner the party was sent to retrieve.
source_quote: the freed drow, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a traumatized commoner who escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: traumatized commoners Teegan and Drystan who had escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is a traumatized commoner who escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: traumatized commoners Teegan and Drystan who had escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deep gnome guard serving Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Gabberforth, the deep gnome guard

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord whose Chosen were rumored to be killed in Hillsfar.
source_quote: rumors of Graz'zt's Chosen being killed in Hillsfar

subject: Yugoloth
fact: The Yugoloth appears as a handsome half-elf to most observers.
source_quote: appearing as a handsome half-elf to most

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon taunts Bramgrim with the phrase 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside.'
source_quote: "So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man."

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon taunts Akritas with the phrase 'I have played with the minds of demons who define terror.'
source_quote: "I have played with  the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you."

subject: hags
fact: Three hags arrive to take over guard duty at the hanging gardens.
source_quote: glimpsed three hags arriving to take over guard duty

subject: hags
fact: The hags mutter that they cannot get good hired help these days.
source_quote: "You can't get good hired help these days."

subject: Blood War
fact: Chasme Demons are designed to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: creatures designed to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Maram il Vass's office
fact: The party returns to Maram il Vass's office with the freed prisoner.
source_quote: escaped back to Maram il Vass's office

subject: hanging gardens
fact: The hanging gardens are located downstairs and contain hanging cages.
source_quote: directed them to the hanging gardens below to retrieve their prisoner

subject: storage room
fact: The storage room contains empty containers.
source_quote: descended through a storage room filled with empty containers

subject: Underdark
fact: The party's journey previously went through the Underdark.
source_quote: journey through the Underdark

subject: defensible cave
fact: The party previously rested in a defensible cave.
source_quote: rest in a defensible cave

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is the location where rumors say Graz'zt's Chosen were killed.
source_quote: killed in Hillsfar

subject: Abyss
fact: Chasme Demons originate from the Abyss.
source_quote: intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss

subject: armor
fact: Felkur created two sets of armor that appear genuine for eight hours.
source_quote: create two sets of armor, which would appear genuine for the next eight hours

subject: key
fact: Maram il Vass hands the party a key to access the hanging gardens.
source_quote: handed them a key and directed them

subject: key
fact: The party takes the key from the door after Maram il Vass unlocks it.
source_quote: The party takes the key from the door

subject: luminescent fungus
fact: Luminescent fungus clings to the ceiling of the cavern providing pale glow.
source_quote: bathed in the eerie pale glow of luminescent fungus clinging to the ceiling

subject: chains
fact: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern suspending cages.
source_quote: Heavy chains ran the length of the cavern, suspending numerous cages

subject: cages
fact: Numerous cages hang from the ceiling in the cavern.
source_quote: suspending numerous cages from floor to ceiling

subject: empty containers
fact: The storage room is filled with empty containers.
source_quote: storage room filled with empty containers

subject: empty shelves
fact: A room below the office contains empty shelves.
source_quote: enter a room with empty shelves

subject: bottles
fact: A room below the office contains bottles.
source_quote: room with empty shelves, bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: vials
fact: A room below the office contains vials.
source_quote: room with empty shelves, bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: casks
fact: A room below the office contains casks.
source_quote: room with empty shelves, bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: boxes
fact: A room below the office contains boxes.
source_quote: room with empty shelves, bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: crates
fact: A room below the office contains crates.
source_quote: room with empty shelves, bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: barrels
fact: A room below the office contains barrels.
source_quote: room with empty shelves, bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: longsword
fact: Daein uses a longsword to strike a demon.
source_quote: Daein charged forward with his longsword

subject: bow
fact: Akritas uses a bow to attack the demons.
source_quote: loosing arrows at it

subject: proboscis
fact: The Chasme Demon attacks with its proboscis.
source_quote: lunged at her with its proboscis

subject: Spiritual Weapon
fact: Bramgrim summons a spectral weapon to aid in the fight.
source_quote: summoning a spectral weapon to aid in the fight

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim calls forth spectral guardians that swirl around him.
source_quote: Bramgrim called forth spectral guardians that swirled around him

subject: no-betrayal clause
fact: Felkur crafts a no-betrayal clause into the contract.
source_quote: Felkur then crafted a no-betrayal clause

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: Two Chasme Demons appear in the cavern.
source_quote: Two Chasme Demons appeared

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear stands ready to strike during the battle.
source_quote: The Owlbear stood ready to strike

subject: Balgura demon
fact: The party previously battled two Balgura demons.
source_quote: battle with two Balgura demons

subject: shield guardian
fact: Gabberforth has a shield guardian.
source_quote: Gabberforth and his shield guardian

subject: deception check
fact: Daein rolls a natural 20 on a deception check.
source_quote: natural 20 on a deception check

subject: Toll the Dead
fact: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon

subject: Firebolt
fact: Felkur casts Firebolt dealing fire damage to a demon.
source_quote: Felkur casts Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas casts Hunter's Mark on a Chasme Demon.
source_quote: Akritas attacks a Chasme Demon with her bow and casts Hunter's Mark

subject: Spiritual Weapon break
fact: Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon shatters the chain holding a cage.
source_quote: directed his spectral weapon to strike at the chain holding one of the cages, and it shattered

subject: Action Surge
fact: Daein uses Action Surge for additional attacks.
source_quote: using Action Surge for additional attacks

subject: critical strike
fact: The Chasme Demon lands a vicious critical strike on Bramgrim.
source_quote: taking a vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis

subject: deal
fact: Felkur and Maram il Vass finalize a contract with magical force.
source_quote: The contract was finalized with magical force

subject: Felkur's stolen item
fact: Maram il Vass is searching for an item Felkur allegedly stole.
source_quote: connected to an item the artificer had allegedly stolen

subject: Felkur's location
fact: Maram il Vass has made a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur.
source_quote: made a deal with a devil who sought Felkur

subject: Gabberforth's warning
fact: Teegan warned the party about Gabberforth.
source_quote: warning about Gabberforth

subject: armor origin story
fact: Felkur claims the armor came from bandit camps and a raided castle.
source_quote: claimed the sets came from bandit camps and a raided castle
